channel.title: Central District Events
channel.description: Upcoming events for Central District Events

item.title: Free Tax Help
item.description:
Saturday, April 11, 2026 at 12 PM

Location: Douglass-Truth Branch, Meeting Room

Trained volunteers will be available to answer questions and prepare personal tax returns.

From SPL - Douglass-Truth Branch

Event details

item.title: Free Tax Help
item.description:
Monday, April 13, 2026 at 12 PM

Location: Douglass-Truth Branch, Meeting Room

Trained volunteers will be available to answer questions and prepare personal tax returns.

From SPL - Douglass-Truth Branch

Event details

item.title: Office Hours with Department of Neighborhoods
item.description:
Tuesday, April 14, 2026 at 3 PM

Location: Douglass-Truth Branch

The City of Seattle’s Department of Neighborhoods will be holding office hours as part of their ‘Meeting Community Where They Are At’ Initiative.

From SPL - Douglass-Truth Branch

Event details

item.title: Family Story Time
item.description:
Wednesday, April 15, 2026 at 10:30 AM

Location: Douglass-Truth Branch, Meeting Room

At storytime, kids ages 0-5 and their families can enjoy stories, songs, and fun learning activities.

From SPL - Douglass-Truth Branch

Event details

item.title: Teen Zone!
item.description:
Wednesday, April 15, 2026 at 4 PM

Location: Douglass-Truth Branch, Meeting Room

Teens! Drop in for Teen Zone! a rotating series of activities and fun.

From SPL - Douglass-Truth Branch

Event details

item.title: Trivia at Woodshop BBQ
item.description:
Wednesday, April 15, 2026 at 6:30 PM

Location: 2513 E Cherry St, Seattle, WA 98122

Weekly pub trivia hosted by Head in the Clouds Trivia

From Trivia at Woodshop BBQ

Event details

item.title: Mandala Workshop with Maya Milton
item.description:
Thursday, April 16, 2026 at 4 PM

Location: Northwest African American Museum, 2300 South Massachusetts Street, Seattle, WA, 98144

item.title: Central District Art Walk (First Friday)
item.description:
Friday, May 1, 2026 at 6 PM

item.title: Cribbage Club
item.description:
Thursday, May 7, 2026 at 7 PM

On the 1st & 3rd Thursday of each month there is Cribbage Club

From Chuck's Hop Shop - Central District
